Items.Name: Import-FinPostBudget
Items.XML:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ImportExportSpecification Path = "C:\Temp\SUF\FinPostBudget.csv" xmlns="urn:www.microsoft.com/office/access/imexspec">
      <ImportText TextFormat="Delimited" FirstRowHasNames="true" FieldDelimiter=";" TextDelimiter="{DoubleQuote}" CodePage="1252" Destination="FinPostBudget" >
               <DateFormat DateOrder="DMY" DateDelimiter="-" TimeDelimiter=":" FourYearDates="true" DatesLeadingZeros="false" />
           <NumberFormat DecimalSymbol="," />
             <Columns PrimaryKey="Entydigt id">
                        <Column Name="Col1" FieldName="Entydigt id" Indexed="YESDUPLICATES" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Long" Width="12" />
                        <Column Name="Col2" FieldName="Dato" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="DateTime" Width="11" />
                        <Column Name="Col3" FieldName="Til dato" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="9" />
                        <Column Name="Col4" FieldName="Kommentar" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="10" />
                        <Column Name="Col5" FieldName="Budgetmodel" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="25" />
                        <Column Name="Col6" FieldName="Gentagelse" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="11" />
                        <Column Name="Col7" FieldName="Konto" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="7" />
                        <Column Name="Col8" FieldName="Beløb" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Double" Width="11" />
                        <Column Name="Col9" FieldName="Debet" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="10" />
                        <Column Name="Col10" FieldName="Kredit" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="10" />
                        <Column Name="Col11" FieldName="Regulering %" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Long" Width="13" />
                        <Column Name="Col12" FieldName="Deaktiver" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Long" Width="10" />
                        <Column Name="Col13" FieldName="Kontonavn" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="38" />
                        <Column Name="Col14" FieldName="Kontotype" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="17" />
                        <Column Name="Col15" FieldName="Antal" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Long" Width="6" />
                        <Column Name="Col16" FieldName="Dimension 1" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="21" />
                        <Column Name="Col17" FieldName="Dimension 2" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="12" />
                        <Column Name="Col18" FieldName="Dimension 3" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="12" />
                        <Column Name="Col19" FieldName="Dimension 4" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="12" />
                        <Column Name="Col20" FieldName="Dimension 5" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="12" />
                        <Column Name="Col21" FieldName="Afdeling" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="9" />
                        <Column Name="Col22" FieldName="Bærer" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="6" />
                        <Column Name="Col23" FieldName="Formål" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="7" />
                        <Column Name="Col24" FieldName="SUF Veteran" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="12" />
                        <Column Name="Col25" FieldName="Uddannelse" Indexed="NO" SkipColumn="false" DataType="Text" Width="11" />
             </Columns>
   </ImportText>
</ImportExportSpecification>
